LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS HUA XU, XUE ZHONG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS STAYED PENDING APPEAL. JUDGE: DIANE ELAN WICK, REPORTER: KAREN FARNSWORTH, CSR #: 5162
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT XU, HUA JIE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS HUA JIE XU(SUED AS XU HUA JIE), HUA CAO XU (SUED AS XU HUA CHO) AND XUE YING ZHONG'S (SUED AS ZHONG XUE YING) DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART, OVERRULED IN PART. SUSTAIN DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT. NOTICE IS DEFECTIVE BECAUSE THE NOTICE STATES THAT TELEPHONE CALLS WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED. THIS UNDERMINES THE PURPOSE OF THE PHONE NUMBER REQUIREMENT. SUSTAIN DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO NOTICE TO CURE OR QUIT FOR HABITUAL LATE PAYMENTS. 30 OR 60 NOTICE REQUIRED. CIVIL CODE SECTION 1946. SUSTAIN DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO NOTICE TO CURE OR QUIT WITH REGARDS TO PAY UTILITIES. NOTICE FAILED TO GIVE OPPORTUNITY TO CURE AND IS DEFECTIVE. OVERRULE DEMURRER AS TO NOTICE TO CURE OR QUIT REGARDING 3 DAY NOTICE PROPER UNDER CCP 1161. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR # 4761
